text:
There was once a little bear who liked to swim every day. He liked to play on the rocks, explore little creekbeds, and dream of far-off places.

One sunny morning, while bathing at the pond, the bear saw something peculiar. A group of ducks had landed on a small island. They seemed curious, pecking at the ground.

Curious, the bear cautiously approached the ducks. They chirped at him in a language he didn't understand. Feeling cheerful in their company, the bear soon invited some of his bear friends. There was a fluffy owl, a wise old owl, and even a few squirrels.

They all joined the ducks on the island, enjoying their conversation. Ducks talked about their feathers, where they fly best, and gossip about other ducks' nests.

As the day went on, the bears and ducks became fast friends. The ducks appreciated the strength and bravery of the bears. They showed each other their favorite places in the sky. The bears shared
